rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for stateful equations, const for constants, and assign for output assignments
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
